senses.def_en: to be the same in meaning or effect as (sth.)
senses.def_zh: (在意义、价值等方面)等同，接近
senses.example: In fact, your ambiguous words amount to a refusal.
senses.example_zh: 实际上，你说的那些模棱两可的话等于是拒绝。

senses.example: We mounted some stone steps to a gallery. 我们登上几级石阶，来到一间陈列室。 // Mr. Rochester mounted his horse and rode off.
senses.example_zh: 罗切斯特先生上了马，疾驰而去。

senses.example: He is mounting a campaign against drunk drivers.
senses.example_zh: 他正在发起一场反对酒后驾车的运动。

senses.example: A compass was mounted on the dashboard.
senses.example_zh: 一架罗盘安装在仪表上。

senses.def_en: to go beyond the limits of; surpass
senses.example: Exceeding the speed limit in urban areas will be fined. 在市区内超速驾车会被罚款。 // His success exceeds his hope.
senses.example_zh: 他的成功超过自己所望。
这支球队打得非常出色。

senses.def_en: an amount beyond what is sufficient
senses.example: An excess of fat in one's diet can lead to heart disease.
senses.example_zh: 食物中脂肪过多可能导致心脏病。

senses.example: The car reached speeds in excess of 100 miles per hour.
senses.example_zh: 这辆汽车的时速超过了 100 英里。

senses.example: Your parcel is too heavy and you must pay the excess postal charge.
senses.example_zh: 你的邮包超重，你必须支付超重邮资。

entries.mnemonic: under(在……下面)+line(划线)→在……下面划线做“强调”

senses.def_en: to draw a line under sth.
senses.example: When you are reading, underline the important points.
The crisis underlines the embarrassing problem the government faces.
senses.example_zh: 这场危机使政府面临的问题更为突出。

senses.def_en: to be the basis of; account for
senses.example: The social problems underlying these crises remain unsolved.
senses.example_zh: 引起这些危机的社会问题尚未解决。

senses.def_en: to put to use, esp. to make effective use of
senses.example: The Romans were the first to utilize concrete as a building material.
senses.example_zh: 罗马人首先使用混凝土做建筑材料。

senses.example: This computer is of low utility for the home user.
senses.example_zh: 这台计算机对家庭用户用处不大。

senses.example: Railroads, bus lines, gas and electric companies are public utilities.
senses.example_zh: 铁路、公共汽车、煤气和电力公司都是公用事业。

senses.example: The company is moving to new premises.

senses.def_en: a statement or idea that is accepted as being true and that is used as the basis of an argument

extras.content: Isn't that like trying to maintain a smile at your wedding reception while some relative gives a toast that amounts to “marriage is hard work”? 译文：这不就像在自己婚宴上听某个亲戚给你讲“婚姻不易”之类的祝酒辞，却还不得不努力保持笑容一样难受吗？
in excess of 超过 // to excess 过度，过分，过量 He is optimistic to excess. 他过于乐观了。
He utilizes the facts he observes to the fullest extent. 译文：他总是最充分地利用他观察到的事实。
